title: Lion Den Cobblemon
description: Cobblemon Modpack with Plenty of Quality of Life Mods to make the experience feel more natural.
body:
**Welcome to Lion Den Cobblemon**

Get ready to take your Minecraft experience to the next level with Lion Den Cobblemon, a unique modpack that combines the best of quality-of-life mods with a plethora of Cobblemon additions. This modpack is designed to make your Minecraft gameplay more efficient, enjoyable, and rewarding.

Some Quality of Life Mods:

Streamline your building experience with Easy Build, Fastcraft, and Carpenter's Blocks
Optimize your inventory management with Inventory Sorting to sort the mess, Nature's Compass to find certain pokemon spawn locations, Shader Packs to make the game look better, and plenty more!

Some Cobblemon Addons:

Ascension Megamons: Adds plenty of Mega Pokemon Variations to make battling easier!

More Cobblemon Loot: This adds more Cobblemon Loot to the base loottables to make it easier to level up, evolve, and battle pokemon~

In Lion Den Cobblemon, you'll find a carefully curated selection of mods that will make your Minecraft experience more enjoyable, challenging, and rewarding. With a focus on quality of life and exploration, this modpack is perfect for players of all skill levels looking to shake up their Minecraft routine. 

**Join the discord for support or to join the public server!**
